title: Braised Mushroom Stew
description: A hearty and comforting stew made with sautéed mushrooms and tender beef.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown beef on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove from pot.
Add more oil if necessary, then sauté onions until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start browning, about 5 minutes.
Add flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add broth, browned beef, and seasonings. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 1/2 hours, or until beef is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
